title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 475.504 - Communication between courts
text:
475.504.  Communication between courts. — 1.  A court of this state may communicate with a court in another state concerning a proceeding arising under sections 475.501 to 475.555.  The court may allow the parties to participate in the communication.  Except as otherwise provided in subsection 2 of this section, the court shall make a record of the communication.  The record may be limited to the fact that the communication occurred.
  2.  Courts may communicate concerning schedules, calendars, court records, and other administrative matters without making a record.
(L. 2011 H.B. 111 merged with S.B. 59 merged with S.B. 213)
